@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "nats-5394-performance-degradation-with-slow-consumers-v2-9-x-v2-10-x",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "nats: Performance degradation with slow consumers [v2.9.X, v2.10.X]",
+    "description": "Performance degradation with slow consumers [v2.9.X, v2.10.X]. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "analyze",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify nats analyze symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your nats deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats -n nats --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review nats configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant nats configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats\nkubectl get configmap -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=nats\n```\n### Observed behavior\n\nPerformance degradation after the slow consumer connection. \nAs you can see below, we are observing about 30% degradation of the incoming messages when the slow consumer connected, and about 50% after the second one."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Performance degradation with slow consumers [v2.9.X,…",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\ndocker build -t test/nats:latest .\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Performance degradation with slow consumers… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats -n nats --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n nats --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/pull/6568",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "docker build -t test/nats:latest .",
+        "nats bench updates --pub=4 --msgs 1000000000 --size=1000",
+        "docker run --rm -it --network=nats-test_default test/nats:latest python3 slow-consumer.py"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "nats",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "analyze"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "nats"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "analyze"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/issues/5394",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/pull/6568"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with nats installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:46:46.406Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
